vBRIEFInfo.author: overdeck/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-448: Start Agent confirmation timeout too short — button reverts before user can click

plan.title: Start Agent confirmation timeout too short — button reverts before user can click
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-6

narratives.Problem: The Start Agent button's two-click confirm pattern uses a setTimeout to auto-revert after 7s. Users can't click fast enough, and increasing the timeout is a bandaid — the time-based dismiss is the root cause.
narratives.Proposal: Replace the setTimeout with a click-outside + Escape dismiss pattern, following the existing ContainerSection.tsx pattern. Confirmation stays visible until explicitly dismissed.

items.title: Replace setTimeout confirm with click-outside/Escape dismiss pattern

narrative.Action: In KanbanBoard.tsx: (1) Remove confirmingStartTimer ref and setTimeout call. (2) Add startButtonRef on the confirm button. (3) Add useEffect that listens for mousedown outside button and Escape keydown when confirmingStart is true, calling setConfirmingStart(false). Follow ContainerSection.tsx:38-44 pattern.

subItems.title: Clicking 'Start Agent' shows 'Click to confirm' and it stays visible indefinitely (no timeout)
Second click on button triggers agent start
Clicking outside the button dismisses the confirm state
Pressing Escape dismisses the confirm state
No setTimeout remains in the Start Agent confirm flow
